name: 5dim_space_age
title: 5Dim's mod - Space Age
author: 5Dim
description:
Space Age module for 5Dim's mod (Requires Space Age DLC)
Expands all Space Age machines with multiple tiers
Vulcanus:
- 10 tiers of foundries
- 10 tiers of big mining drills
Gleba:
- 10 tiers of biochambers
- 10 tiers of agricultural towers
- 10 tiers of captive biter spawners
Fulgora:
- 10 tiers of electromagnetic plants
- 10 tiers of recyclers
Aquilo:
- 10 tiers of cryogenic plants
- 10 tiers of heating towers
Space Platform:
- 10 tiers of cargo bays
- 10 tiers of asteroid collectors
- 10 tiers of crushers
- 10 tiers of thrusters
- 10 tiers of fusion reactor equipment
